title: DISCOVERY - 211info
text: EMERGENCE ALBANY DISCOVERY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists those seeking Oregon DMV certificates, occupational driver's licenses, court or corrections requirements resolution, DUII and DMV requirements fulfillment, or other diversion purposes. 1856 Grand Prairie Road SE Albany, OR 97322 Eligibility: Individuals who are seeking a solution for required treatment for DUII diversion or other diversion Hours: Groups: Tuesday/Wednesday/Friday 5:30pm-7:30pm, Saturday 9am-11am Email (541) 967-6597 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 967-6597 Hotline (541) 607-4821 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by service, OHP, private insurance, sliding scale DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Linn County Services: Diversion Programs DUI Offender Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - THRESHOLD INTENSIVE OUTPATIENT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EMERGENCE ALBANY
